name: ServiceNow
description: ServiceNow ITSM incidents (Table API) as redact-and-pass governed evidence.

steps: Create a dedicated integration user with `rest_service` + the incident table-read roles (least privilege).
The password is the resolved secret; the instance host + username are non-secret runtime config (below).

runtime_config.label: ServiceNow instance host
runtime_config.description: Bare hostname, e.g. acme.service-now.com (host-validated before the URL is built; no path/query injection).

runtime_config.label: Integration-user username
runtime_config.description: Non-secret Basic-auth username for the integration user (paired with the resolved password).

runtime_config.label: Page size (sysparm_limit)
runtime_config.description: Rows per page; sysparm_offset advances by this until a short page (offset pagination).

runtime_config.label: sysparm_fields (comma list)
runtime_config.description: Optional field selection (urlencoded; cannot inject sibling query params).

data.pii_posture: Incident description/short_description are free-text that routinely carry secrets/PII -> passed through adapter.core.redaction.redact (redact-and-pass: scrubs secret/PHI/PAN + email/phone). The caller_id/caller identity field is NEVER read. number/state/priority are the non-PII metadata surface. FX-SEC-001 is the un-bypassable backstop.
data.redaction: redact-and-pass (description + short_description); caller identity never read

instructions.text: Create a least-privilege ServiceNow integration user (rest_service + incident table-read roles).
Provide the instance host + integration username (non-secret runtime config).
Test the connection: an active poll returns recent incidents with description redact-and-passed; caller identity is never read.

wire_gates: Table API documented shape: GET https://<instance>/api/now/table/incident, HTTP Basic, `{result:[...]}` envelope, sysparm_offset/sysparm_limit offset pagination (stop-on-short-page). instance is host-validated + the URL is urllib-built (SSRF-4 fix, #133) so instance/fields cannot inject host/path/query.
OAuth 2.0 is a deferred alternative; Basic auth this cycle.
Live flip gated on operator human review + a live Table-API poll with a real integration-user credential (ADR-0012).
live_readiness: Flip-ready, NOT yet Live. Parse + redact-and-pass surface + the live fetch-half (build_servicenow_spec, Basic + offset pagination) are built and harness-proven against recorded 2-page fixtures; the SSRF-4 URL-injection gap is fixed (#133). Gated on operator review + a live poll with a real integration-user credential. To flip: provide the password + instance + username; wire GatewaySink; run the live poll; review before promoting.
